text:
Pharos AgentPay x402 Skill Suite
AI agents can pay for APIs on Pharos.

Agents need paid data without accounts,
API keys, cards, or manual approval.

AgentPay packages the flow as reusable skills:
discover, pay-fetch, and decode receipt.

Studio or any agent calls the Skill API,
which negotiates x402 with protected resources.

First, the endpoint returns HTTP 402
with Pharos payment requirements.

Then pay-fetch checks the budget,
signs a payment payload, and retries.

Premium RWA data comes back with a normalized receipt
and idempotent retry safety.

Real mode swaps the mock ledger for wallet,
facilitator, and Pharos Atlantic Testnet settlement.

AgentPay is a payment primitive
for agent-to-agent commerce.
